data.content: Fixed step-aware dispatch preamble in terminal-manager take-loop: wrapSingleBeatPrompt now accepts isReview param, buildNextTakePrompt passes isReviewStep(resolved.step). Extracted dispatchPreamble() helper used by all 3 wrapper paths (parent, single-beat initial, take-loop). Added unit tests. Commit b16371e1fa77 pushed to origin/main.
